hero_sub: Know exactly which campaigns truly drive profit after confirmation, delivery, and returns.

promesse_title: Finally the truth about every campaign

faq_a1: Yes, RiseManager integrates perfectly with Meta Ads and TikTok Ads via official APIs. You can manage both accounts from a single dashboard.
faq_q2: Can we track multiple ad accounts?
faq_a2: Absolutely. Depending on your plan, you can connect multiple ad accounts and analyze the data globally or individually.
faq_a3: Yes, we synchronize your sales, deliveries, and ad costs data every 5 minutes for live decisions.
faq_a4: RiseManager was built primarily for Cash On Delivery. It integrates confirmation rates, delivery rates, and returns to calculate your real profit.
faq_a5: Yes, the Empire Ads plan allows you to connect and manage multiple Shopify or WooCommerce stores simultaneously.
faq_a6: You can export all your reports to CSV, PDF, or have them sent automatically via email to your team or clients.
